name: Potato, Onion, and Rosemary Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Heat butter in a 10-inch skillet until melted. Stir in onions, rosemary, salt, and pepper.
3. Cook over low heat, stirring frequently, until the onion is very soft and begins to brown, about 20 minutes.
4. Arrange half of the potato slices in a greased 10 x 1-1/2 inch pie plate.
5. Top with half of the onion mixture.
6. Repeat layers.
7. Pour half and half over top.
8. Cover with foil.
9. Bake for 1 hour.
10. Uncover and cook until the top is golden brown, about 20 minutes longer.
11. Cut into wedges to serve.
